narrative:
Pleasant Twp township has 3,544 registered voters, with 58.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.2 percentage points.
